## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Plugin validator passes
- [ ] No credentials, session URLs, temporary asset URLs, or user-specific absolute paths are committed
- [ ] Browser workflow changes were tested in the Codex in-app browser or clearly marked as not live-tested

## Image workflow status

If applicable, report generated count, exported count, measured dimensions, and review state separately.
